faq.label: FAQ
faq.description: Find quick answers about admissions, online learning, placement support, distance education, and student guidance programs.
faq.institutionQuestion: How can I tell if using Aritech is right for my institution?
faq.institutionAnswer: Aritech is designed for schools, coaching centers, and educational institutions looking for a modern LMS, admissions, and student management solution.
faq.transitionQuestion: How long does it take to transition to the platform?
faq.transitionAnswer: Most institutions can complete onboarding and initial setup within a few days depending on the size and requirements.
faq.workflowQuestion: Will we need to make changes in our current workflow?
faq.workflowAnswer: No major changes are required. The platform is built to simplify and streamline your existing academic and operational processes.
faq.classesQuestion: Do you provide online and recorded classes?
faq.classesAnswer: Yes. Students can access both live and recorded sessions through the LMS with mobile-friendly learning support.

hero.label: About Aritech
hero.description: Aritech is a career-focused learning platform helping students, aspirants, graduates, and working professionals build real-world skills through practical training, mentorship, and industry-oriented education.
hero.trusted: Trusted by students across multiple career paths

story.label: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Aritech was created with a simple vision to bridge the gap between academic learning and real-world career skills. Many students complete courses without practical exposure, mentorship, or industry direction.
story.paragraph2: Through career-focused programs, practical training, mentorship, and flexible learning opportunities, we help students, aspirants, graduates, and professionals build confidence and move toward meaningful career growth.
story.practicalDescription: Hands-on training focused on real-world application.
story.guidanceDescription: Mentorship and support aligned with industry needs.
story.flexibleDescription: Learning paths for students, aspirants, and professionals.
story.studentDescription: Focused on helping learners build confidence and skills.

mission.label: Mission & Vision
mission.description: Our vision and mission are centered around helping students build practical skills, confidence, and career opportunities through accessible and career-focused learning.
mission.vision1: To make career-focused education more practical, accessible, and empowering for every learner.
mission.vision2: To help students gain confidence, real-world skills, and meaningful career opportunities.
mission.vision3: To build a learning environment that supports growth, flexibility, and continuous improvement.
mission.mission1: Deliver practical and industry-oriented training programs.
mission.mission2: Support students through mentorship, guidance, and skill development.
mission.mission3: Create learning experiences that prepare students for real career opportunities.
